headline: Citizens Financial Joins Project Keystone As Valuation Gap And Momentum Stand Out
summary: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) has joined Project Keystone, a regulated, bank controlled digital currency network initiative. The project brings together U.S. banks to build shared infrastructure for tokenized deposits and digital money. Participation places Citizens Financial Group alongside peers experimenting with regulated digital asset rails. For investors watching NYSE:CFG, this move comes with the stock at a recent share price of $64.42 and a value score of 3. Returns have been...
